title: rawhide: brq / blkio / loopbackfs / something broken
body: No clue what. loopbackfs tests are broken on rawhide. [bz2226558](https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2226558). This is just a tracking issue for benefit of tracking skipped tests.

comments.body: Bug does not reproduce on 6.5.0-0.rc6.20230818git0e8860d2125f.47.fc40.x86_64 but I'm not going to close this nor remove the test skips yet, not until we understand the problem and where else it may manifest.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
